Preterit.turoyo: Šğǝš hawni baḥ ḥaye du yulfono. (İlyas p.c)
translations:
my
			mind has been confused by the life of learning.

Infectum-wa.turoyo: ono meqәm hawni ġalabe mәšġәš-wa. (İlyas p.c)
translations:
Earlier
			my mind was very much confused

Infectum.turoyo: Uʕdo komәšġәš hawni. (İlyas p.c) Now my mind is being confused.

translations:
Meqәm aḥ ḥaye ġalabe
			šġiše wayne. (İlyas p.c)

Participle_Passive.turoyo: ono meqәm hawni ġalabe šġišo wa. (İlyas p.c)
translations:
Earlier
			my mind was very much confused.
